name: pi-intercom
description: Direct local messaging between Pi and Codex coding-agent sessions.

interface.shortDescription: Coordinate local Pi and Codex sessions
interface.longDescription: Pi Intercom provides direct 1:1 local messaging for coding-agent sessions. The Pi extension offers native inline delivery and overlays; the Codex plugin exposes MCP tools for listing sessions, sending messages, asking questions, replying to pending asks, and checking pending messages.
defaultPrompt: Use Pi Intercom to coordinate with another local coding-agent session
